title: thelypteris muluensis
intro: Thelypteris muluensis, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Thelypteris muluensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Thelypteris muluensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and it is also used in traditional remedies for wound healing and as an antiseptic.
